_comment: Real-shape mcp-proxy /call response for openagentic_loki.loki_search_errors, captured live 2026-05-13 on chat-dev (k3s prod, monitoring-stack Loki). The oap-loki-mcp tool returns a FORMATTED MULTI-LINE TEXT STRING (server.py loki_search_errors lines 286-361) — NOT a structured dict. FastMCP wraps the string return in content[{type:'text', text: <string>}]. The mcp-proxy passes through 2 layers of result unwrap (proxy.result → jsonrpc.result) then surfaces { content: [...], isError: false }. The mcp_tool node's content-block joiner (WorkflowExecutionEngine.ts lines 2106-2117) collapses the content[] array down to a single `content` string. Downstream transforms parse that string. Real error sources captured: postgresql missing-relation errors (UserMemoryEntry, admin.user_context_index — known Prisma migration drift), milvus collection-not-found warnings (agents collection missing — known seed gap), mcp-proxy access-policy fetch failures (Failed to fetch access policies for group system-admins — bad URL config). These are REAL recurring issues in the cluster as of 2026-05-13, not invented errors.
